hero.title: XutronCore
hero.subtitle: The central hub for all your applications. Seamlessly manage, update, and launch your software suite from one powerful, unified interface.

patches.title: Latest Updates
features.title: Why XutronCore?
features.c1_desc: The launcher automatically checks for the latest versions of your applications, notifying you instantly so you never miss a critical update.
features.c2_desc: Powered by a secure API that interfaces with private repositories. Your launcher gets version data without ever exposing sensitive access tokens.
features.c3_desc: New applications can be added to the ecosystem instantly by updating a central configuration, with no need to redeploy the launcher itself.

settings.about_desc: The official home for the XutronCore application suite.
